title: amaryllis × unduliflora
intro: Amaryllis × unduliflora, also known as the Undulate Amaryllis or Tiger Lily, is a hybrid plant in the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Amaryllis × unduliflora include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
